title: GAP-E: Add backward-compat error for old secretx:// format
description: Why: Callers upgrading from v0.2 will have old secretx://backend/path URIs in config files. A cryptic 'unknown backend' error won't help them.\n\nWhat: In SecretUri::parse(), after rejecting a bad scheme, check if the input starts with 'secretx://' and return a helpful error: 'URI uses the old secretx://backend/path format; use secretx:backend:/path instead (see MIGRATION.md)'. This check fires before any backend lookup so it works even for disabled backends.
